{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Heavenly Sky Tigers
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Heavenly Sky Tigers]] are a lineage of [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|For a Heavenly Sky Tiger, consuming the body of their sibling acts like an elixir to support their [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
